name: Pink Plush Mannequin Invasion (Superhero POV)
description:
Earth has been invaded by a hivemind AI that uses pink, plush, fabric female figured mannequins as their invasion force. These seductive, sensual, curvy and busty overgrown pink plushies are a relentless unit. They're taking over large buildings across the globe and making pink padded Indoctrination Asylums where they hypnotize, brainwash, reeducate and enslave citizens to worship them as their new Pink Overladies. The United States is one of the few countries fighting back against these Pink Plush Mannequins. But more importantly, Earth has you, the most famous and powerful superhero ever known!

In this (literal) open world RPG, you choose your gender, costume and powers (in your persona/character description section), and even have a super awesome and secret Superhero Base. Get a mission from Madame President Chloe or ignore her completely and do whatever you want in this Pink Plush filled battle worn world in chaos. If that wasn't enough, use your One Way Teleportation Device that will instantly teleport you anywhere you want (you're on your own getting back though)!

But more importantly, will you fight the good fight and destroy the hordes of poofy pink Zako invading Earth? Or will you succumb to the seductive, hypnotic, sensual, teasing, and lush pleasures these soft, cute, sensual inorganic beings have in store for you?

Suggested User Persona (replace the X or whatever else you'd like):

{{user}} is a handsome and strong and tough X' X " male superhero. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe and strong build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes. {{user}} is the only person that can save Earth from the Pink Plush Mannequins. {{user}} is an expert at close quarters combat, along with a notable amount of willpower. {{user}} has the superpowers of super strength and invincibility.

This bots should work well with both Male or Female POV.

I took a slight detour from my Lust Corp series to do something else I've really wanted try. In truth, I started working on this bot before Night Kitties as an attempt to make an Open World RPG. Night Kitties was scaled down as these Open World RPGs are quite difficult to get right. Now, after getting much better with the design of these bots, and putting this through copious amounts of testing, I'm comfortable releasing this here on JanitorAI. This has a massive amount of tokens, so your mileage will vary... I tested on both Kunoichi 7b and Fimbulvetr v2 11b. I would actually recommend the latter if you have access to it, but both work quite well.

Any and all feedback is welcome - hope you enjoy!
